extras.content: take sb. into custody 将某人拘捕
Every year thousands of people are arrested and taken to court for shop-lifting. 译文:每年有成千上万的人因入店行窃而被捕并走上法庭。

senses.def_en: to move sth. from one country into another illegally and secretly
senses.example: Smuggling is prohibited because it will make countries suffer losses in customs duties.
senses.example_zh: 禁止走私，因为它会减少国家不少关税。

senses.def_en: to take or bring sth. secretly
senses.example: He managed to smuggle his notes into the examination.
senses.example_zh: 他设法偷偷把笔记带进考场。

senses.example: The two men were locked in mortal combat.
senses.example_zh: 那两人在进行生死决斗。

senses.def_en: to fight or struggle against; try to defeat
senses.example: The police are now using computers to help combat crime.
senses.example_zh: 警方现在用计算机来帮助打击犯罪。

senses.example: When her parents died, she was placed in the custody of her aunt.
senses.example_zh: 她的父母去世以后，她就交由姑妈照管。

senses.example: He is in custody awaiting trial.
senses.example_zh: 他已被拘留候审。

senses.example: He was arrested for shooting on campus.
senses.example_zh: 他因在校园开枪伤人而被逮捕。

senses.def_en: to stop the progress or movement of (sth.)
senses.example: They failed to arrest the company's decline.
senses.example_zh: 他们未能阻止公司的衰落。

senses.def_en: to attract and hold the attention of sb./sth.
senses.example: An unusual painting arrested his attention.
senses.example_zh: 一幅异乎寻常的画引起了他的注意。

senses.example: place/put sb. under arrest
senses.example_zh: 逮捕某人

senses.example: You have to finish the work within the given time.
senses.example_zh: 你们必须在规定时间内完成这项工作。

senses.example: given value
senses.example_zh: 已知值

senses.example: He is given to boasting.
senses.example_zh: 他喜欢吹牛。

senses.example: Given their inexperience, they've done a good job.
senses.example_zh: 考虑到他们没有经验，这项工作做得已经不错了。

senses.example: The terms of the contract are subject to review.
senses.example_zh: 合同的条款有待复查决定。

senses.example: a review of progress in technology
senses.example_zh: 回顾科技取得的进步

senses.example: Her latest novel got good reviews in the press.
senses.example_zh: 她的最新小说得到了报界的好评。

senses.example: Government spending has been reviewed to try and reduce the budget deficit.
senses.example_zh: 对政府开支进行了审核，以争取减少预算赤字。

senses.def_en: to report on or judge the quality of a book, show, etc.
senses.example: be well reviewed
senses.example_zh: 受到好评

senses.example: Books are placed in categories in libraries and bookstores.
senses.example_zh: 图书馆和书店的书是分门别类摆放的。
